raw_response.prompt: Create one realistic vertical 9:16 start frame for the retry video. Use the reference image only for product identity. Locked-off chest-up still of an adult woman seated at a minimal light-wood table by a softly lit window. She wears a neutral cream top and a smooth, even rosy lipstick that matches the provided product reference (satin-matte, not glossy). She lightly holds a plain white ceramic mug just below her lips, about to sip; the rim is clean, plain, and blank with no text or markings. On the table near the mug sits the same lipstick tube from the reference, cap off, bullet exposed, any real brand mark from the reference facing camera; no extra cases or duplicate products. Soft diffused daylight, uncluttered beige background. Stable composition; natural skin texture; no on-screen text, watermarks, or letters anywhere. No captions, UI, overlays, random letters, readable text, or fake logos.
raw_response.negative_prompt: visible lipstick mark on mug rim; smudged or messy lipstick; lipstick on teeth; distorted or uncanny lips; warped or duplicated fingers; extra hands; deformed or transparent mug; glass cup; chipped mug; harsh glare or overexposure; shaky handheld camera; abrupt cuts or montage; split screens; unreadable tiny logos or invented brands; mismatched lip color vs product; extreme close-up warping; heavy motion blur; noisy or cluttered background; mirror reflections; wet, drippy gloss; cracked or overly dry lips., cuts, jump cuts, montage, split screen, scene change, multiple locations, extra characters, subtitles, UI, watermarks, fake logos, random text, shaky camera, flicker, warped hands, distorted face, warped product, blurred proof detail, captions, subtitles, watermark, UI, random letters, readable words, fake logos, extra fingers, warped hands, distorted face, wrong product, blurry product, product-only packshot, empty scene
